entries.summary: Translation jobs worker foundation complete. Migration 013 adds max_attempts/provider_model/locked_at/locked_by/metadata/failed_at + duplicate-active-job index. Repository: find_missing, find_stale, create_job, lock_next (FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED), mark_completed/failed, save_variant. Service: discover_missing/stale, process_next_job, process_batch, retry_failed. FakeTranslationProvider. Worker CLI: python apps/worker/main.py translation-jobs --limit N. Admin endpoints: GET/POST /api/v1/admin/translation-jobs/* (list, create-missing, create-stale, process-next, process-batch). OpenAPI regenerated, TS contracts regenerated. 31 new tests. pytest 129 passed, mypy clean, ruff clean, pnpm typecheck/lint/build/mvp:check all pass.
Started translation jobs queue and worker foundation without real AI provider integration.

Frontend localization badge layer complete. Created localization-labels.ts helper, LocalizationBadge component with 8 variant classes, added badges to CountryHeader, CountryProfileSections, CountryScores, CountryLegalSignals, CountrySources, EvidenceCard, LegalSignalsView, SourcesView, DecisionResultCard, DecisionSources. 6 E2E badge tests added. pnpm typecheck/lint/build/web:mvp:check/format:check all pass. pytest 98 passed, mypy/ruff clean.
Started frontend localization badge layer using existing API localization metadata.

Exposed localization metadata in API responses. Added TranslationFieldMeta and LocalizationMeta schemas. Extended overlay_localized_fields to set item[localization]. Expanded list_best_translation_variants SQL. Added localization field to 10 response schemas. Sources and evidence-items endpoints now run overlay. Contracts regenerated. 10 new tests pass.

Remediated all 22 findings from the backend/database/frontend security and quality audit. Backend: added catch-all and psycopg exception handlers with structured logging, restricted CORS methods/headers, added security headers and in-memory rate limiting middleware, removed environment field from health endpoint, changed app_debug default to false, added startup warning for missing admin token, replaced f-string table/column interpolation in _patch_entity with psycopg.sql.Identifier. Database: migration 012 adds missing FK indexes (translation_jobs, translation_glossary, watchlists, legal_signal_evidence), composite indexes (sources/legal_signals country+status), and changes country_scores/legal_signals CASCADE to RESTRICT. Frontend: fixed useEffect dependency array races in LegalSignalsView and SourcesView via useRef sentinel, added JSON parse safety (response.text() + try/catch) for non-JSON error responses, eliminated silent .catch(() => {}), fixed hardcoded locale=ru in scenarios page, added runtime type guard for error object casts, unified two HTTP clients by fixing both for consistency.

entries.summary: Switched all public read-model paths (country_read_model, decision_engine, legal_signals) to resolve localized text via LocalizationService.overlay_localized_fields() batch resolver. Repo functions now return raw bilingual fields; service layer applies a single batch SQL lookup per entity type. Legacy fallback columns (title_ru/title_en, etc.) are preserved as safety fallback. Migration chain 001-011 verified clean from empty database. Phase A (migration chain idempotency) and Phase B (read-model overlay) both complete.
checks: python -m ruff check apps/api/app/ tests/: passed
python -m mypy apps/api/app/ --ignore-missing-imports: no issues in 52 files

entries.summary: Started clean database migration chain stabilization and read-model adoption of LocalizationService.

Added a non-breaking content-localization foundation with translation units, variants, SHA-256 source hashing, RU-original and EN-legacy backfill, repository and service layers, stale detection, data-quality integration, and regression coverage.
checks: python scripts/apply_migrations.py: passed after local workaround for pre-existing 008/010 fresh-database constraint conflict
python -m mypy apps packages scripts tests: passed

entries.summary: Started content-localization foundation with translation units, variants, hashing, backfill, repository, service, and data-quality checks.

Completed full Russian translation of all remaining English text across frontend and database. Translated StatusBadge labels, LocaleStatusBadge fallback text, API error messages, compare/scenarios page UI strings. Created migration 010 for live-DB translation of country_profiles, sources (titles and notes), evidence_items, user_stories, country_scores, and user_story_documents. Updated existing migrations 002, 004, 005, 009 with Russian content for fresh installs.
Started full Russian translation pass covering all remaining English text in frontend components and all database migration content.

Completed frontend visual reset and Russian-only UI conversion. Removed dark theme, CSS variables, animations, transitions, and box-shadows. Replaced all visible English UI text with Russian. Removed locale switcher from header. Updated all E2E tests to match Russian text patterns. All 38 E2E tests pass.
Started frontend visual reset and Russian-only UI conversion while preserving navigation and functionality.

Implemented evidence traceability UI: EvidenceCard component, expandable evidence panels on legal-signals and sources pages (lazy load), score breakdown with supporting sources, CountryEvidenceSummary cross-links, API client extensions for evidence endpoints.
Started evidence traceability UI work to make score, legal signal, evidence, and source relationships visible in the frontend.
Completed compact dark archive UI: full CSS variable palette, dark theme, decisionLayout two-column, countryCardLayout two-column, scroll utilities. 38/38 E2E passed.
Started compact dark archive UI polish for the MVP frontend.
Started frontend fix to prevent unsupported scenarios from being run through the MVP decision engine.

entries.title: Filter /decision to only show MVP decision-ready scenarios
summary: Created decision-ready-scenarios.ts with DECISION_READY_SCENARIO_SLUGS constant and isDecisionReadyScenario() helper.

Updated DecisionRunForm.tsx to filter scenario list to only the 5 MVP-ready slugs: relocation_residence, permanent_residence_citizenship, low_budget_living, business_self_employment, safety_political_risk.
Added empty state when no decision-ready scenarios are available.
Added data-testid='decision-scenario-select' to the scenario select element.
Improved decision_score_not_found error message to guide the user to MVP scenarios.
Added tests/e2e/web-mvp-decision-ready-scenarios.spec.ts with 4 tests covering filtering, locale=ru, default run, and button state.
All 38 Playwright tests pass (34 original + 4 new). TypeScript, ESLint, Next.js build, ruff, pytest (74 passed), mypy all pass.

entries.summary: Started final Playwright selector hardening for the Decision navigation link in the main MVP flow.

entries.title: Harden Decision navigation E2E selector in main MVP flow
summary: Fixed strict mode violation in web-mvp-main-flow.spec.ts: getByRole('link', { name: 'Decision' }) matched 5 elements.
Replaced with getByRole('navigation').getByRole('link', { name: 'Decision', exact: true }) to scope to nav only.
All 34 Playwright tests pass. TypeScript, ESLint, Next.js build, ruff all pass.

entries.title: Harden MVP E2E selectors for 3 failing tests

Updated web-mvp-main-flow.spec.ts to scope Countries nav click to getByRole('navigation') with exact:true.

entries.title: Start codebase quality and security hardening pass

entries.title: Complete codebase quality and security hardening pass
summary: Reviewed backend routes, services, repositories, schemas, frontend typed API boundary, OpenAPI contract, tests, and tooling.
Hardened admin token verification to use constant-time comparison (secrets.compare_digest) to remove a timing side-channel.
Extended the admin token regression test to cover prefix and longer-token rejection.
Confirmed SQL access is parameterized with whitelisted sort columns and validated locales, public endpoints restrict status to published/archived, and no runtime/cache/build artifacts are tracked.

Upgraded /countries page to use shared typed API client and locale from searchParams.

Extended styles.css with full shell, nav, locale switcher, home page, and error state styles.

entries.title: Complete country card and decision flow

Rewrote /decision/page.tsx as client component; created features/decision-run/ with DecisionRunForm, DecisionResults, DecisionResultCard, DecisionBreakdown, DecisionSources, DecisionWarnings.
DecisionRunForm loads countries/scenarios via API, runs POST /api/v1/decision/run, renders ranked explainable results with strengths, weaknesses, risk warnings, breakdown, and sources.
Added resolveLocale helper to shared/lib/locale.ts and shared/lib/format.ts with formatDate, formatScore, formatWeight.
Updated /countries page: added EmptyState for empty list, iso2 display, improved error typing.
Extended styles.css with all new component classes.

entries.title: Complete legal signals, sources, and data quality pages
summary: Created features/legal-signals/LegalSignalsView.tsx: client component with Suspense boundary, filter state (country/signal_type/impact_direction/impact_level), locale-aware API calls via legalSignalsApi, loading/error/empty states, signal cards with all fields.

Created features/sources/SourcesView.tsx: client component with Suspense boundary, filter state (country/source_type/confidence), sourcesApi calls, loading/error/empty states, source cards with external link, publisher, dates.

Created features/data-quality/DataQualityReportView.tsx: pure presentational server component rendering DataQualityReport summary (overall_status, critical_issues_count, warnings_count, checked_at) and issues list with per-severity left-border styling.
Rewrote app/legal-signals/page.tsx: server shell rendering LegalSignalsView; removed stale apiGet usage and local type definition.
Rewrote app/sources/page.tsx: server shell rendering SourcesView; replaced placeholder.

Rewrote app/internal/data-quality/page.tsx: async server component reading process.env.ADMIN_TOKEN (never NEXT_PUBLIC_), calling dataQualityApi.getDataQualityReport, rendering DataQualityReportView or ErrorState.
Extended styles.css with filterPageWrap, filterBar, filterGroup, filterLabel, filterSelect, clearButton, signalCard, sourceCard, sourceLink, dqWrap, dqSummaryCard, dqIssueCard, dqSeverity-* classes.
Admin token read server-side only via process.env.ADMIN_TOKEN; no secrets exposed to client.
